prompt: Real NotebookLM demo — Side-by-side comparison of two NotebookLM-generated video overviews from the same OpenClaw notebook: 'Power and Peril' (Apr 2026) vs 'Your AI, Your Risk?' (Mar 2026). Shows how the same source notebook produced two different framings. Both sources downloaded from NLM via mcp__notebooklm-mcp.
title: Real NLM artifacts · side-by-side comparison (60s)
description: Two NotebookLM video overviews from the same notebook, edited side-by-side with HyperFrames.

scenes.name: Intro card — comparing two NLM takes
